div1.entryFree: Palm, a tree of the order Palma; the emblem of glory and superiority: must not so stale his p. nobly acquired, Troil. II, 3, 201. gives us more p. in beauty than we have, III, 1, 170. bear the p. for having bravely shed thy wife and children's blood, Cor. V, 3, 117. you shall see him a p. in Athens again and flourish with the highest, Tim. V, 1, 12 (cf. Psalms 92, 12). bear the p. alone, Caes. I, 2, 131. as love between them like the p. might flourish, Hml. V, 2, 40.
